name: nullsec-pineapple-suite
summary: The Largest WiFi Pineapple Pager Payload Collection 125 payloads across 14 categories — more than any other third-party suite

documentation.readme: The Largest WiFi Pineapple Pager Payload Collection 125 payloads across 14 categories — more than any other third-party suite
usage_sections: External WiFi adapter (for monitor mode payloads)
Optional: nmap, hcxdumptool, reaver (install via PackageManager payload or restore.sh)
❌ Do NOT use without explicit written permission

arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

examples: ssh root@$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST "cd /tmp && git clone $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL && cd nullsec-pineapple-suite && ./install.sh"

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with samglish/shodan_metasploit_cli (score=10); pair in the chain planner.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web, cloud, iots] in the Reconnaissance category. Fits when the engagement needs: The Largest WiFi Pineapple Pager Payload Collection 125 payloads across 14 categories — more than any other third-party suite.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: The Largest WiFi Pineapple Pager Payload Collection 125 payloads across 14 categories — more than any other third-party suite.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/bad-antics/nullsec-pineapple-suite && cd nullsec-pineapple-suite && ./install.sh; git clone https://github.com/bad-antics/nullsec-pineapple-suite. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `ssh root@$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST "cd /tmp && git clone $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL && cd nullsec-pineapple-suite && ./install.sh"`. Further invocations from upstream: `./install.sh`; `ssh root@$KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. The Largest WiFi Pineapple Pager Payload Collection 125 payloads across 14 categories — more than any other third-party suite.
